prompt: Make the chick from the second image follow the goose from the third image, then adding them both to the river in the first image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 by adding the goose from image 3 and the chick from image 2 to the river. Position the chick to be swimming directly behind the goose. Place both animals in the calm reflective waters of the river in the foreground, slightly to the left of the bridge, ensuring their appearance, water reflections, and lighting are consistent with the twilight scene of image 1.
objects: Goose swimming in the river, in the foreground, slightly to the left of the bridge
Chick swimming directly behind the goose in the river
Cityscape with a large dome in the background
Reflections of cityscape and sky in the water
Reflections of the goose and chick in the water
